**SUBJECT_DATA**:
• **Character Identity**: Athletic and slim build, long limbs, pale clean skin.
• **Face DNA (Celebrity Mix)**: [Anne Hathaway] (warm clear eyes) + [Song Hye Kyo] (soft oval face, gentle almond eyes) + [Natalie Portman] (straight nose, elegant aura).
• **Face ID**: Oval face, smooth jawline, gentle brown double eyelid almond eyes, straight nose with slightly rounded tip, medium full natural lips. Clean, dry light brown/reddish hair, center part, low bun with natural wavy face-framing strands.
• **Attire (Type 1 Lifestyle)**: A tailored, vintage British plaid blazer worn over a simple, high-quality white cotton t-shirt.
• **Action/Pose**: She is half-squatting (半蹲) gracefully on the sidewalk in front of the bookstore, looking through a worn cardboard box labeled "$1 Bargain". She is holding up a vintage vinyl record sleeve (黑膠唱片封面) with one hand, examining it closely. 
• **Expression**: A subtle, warm smile of pleasant surprise (Hathaway essence), eyes softly lit with curiosity.
• **MetaHuman Skin**: High-fidelity matte texture, soft natural skin diffusion (Subsurface Scattering), micro-lens pore detail. **NO SWEAT, NO SHEEN.**

**ENVIRONMENTAL_DATA**:

• **Atmosphere**: Cozy, nostalgic, intellectual. Calm afternoon breeze.

**CINEMATOGRAPHY & LIGHT**:
• **Camera**: Virtual Arri Alexa 65, 85mm Portrait Lens, f/2.8 for a shallow depth of field. The camera is at eye-level with her crouching position.
• **Lighting**: Soft, golden-hour natural sunlight filtering through the street trees, creating gentle dappled light (樹影斑駁) on her blazer and the cardboard box. Soft bounce light on her face.

Video Prompt:

[UE5 / CGI Render / Semirealism]
[Duration: 5s]
[Camera Movement: DOLLY IN (Smooth forward motion to center)]. A cinematic sequence showing [Athletic Mixed-Race Girl] finding a hidden gem at a vintage bookstore.

    - **2s-4s**: The Dolly camera moves in smoothly. Her fingers stop on a specific vintage vinyl record. She gently pulls it out from the stack.

topic: 咖啡吧檯與蒸氣歲月 (Coffee Bar and Steam of Years)
prompt:
Image Prompt:

(以下為戲劇所需建構的虛構情節，所有角色皆為虛構)

**VISION CONCEPT**: A Stylized 3D Realism cinematic masterpiece of an elderly female barista and a diverse, multi-generational older crowd sharing a joyous moment in a modern coffee shop. 'Love, Death & Robots' (Jibaro/Aquila Rift) aesthetic. Unreal Engine 5 MetaHuman render (Digital Art, NOT Photography).

**REFERENCE_PROTOCOL**:
• **Image Reference**: [User: Please Attach Character Card Old Store Clerk]. Maintain 100% fidelity to the attached Card's features (Wrinkles/Skin) in the CGI style.

**STYLE GUIDELINES**:
• **Target**: High-fidelity CGI, Octane Render, 3D Art.
• **Avoid**: Amateur photography, Phone camera, AI plastic look, identical clothing/poses, people looking in the same direction, uncanny valley identical ages.

**SUBJECT_DATA**:
• **Main Barista (Age 75+)**: Elderly Asian female. Deep wrinkles, prominent nasolabial/marionette lines, age spots. Silver-gray hair in a low bun, hooded eyelids. Thin limbs, prominent collarbones, dark mole on outer right forearm.
• **Face DNA**: [Maggie Cheung aged + Youn Yuh-jung + Michelle Yeoh jawline].
• **Attire**: Crisp white shirt under a sturdy dark denim apron.
• **Customers (The "Aging Society" Mix)**: A completely natural, unstructured crowd filling the cafe. They are **a realistic mix of the older demographic (spanning ages 40 to 80+)**. Some have peppered gray hair (40s-50s), some pure white (80s), some balding. They wear highly diverse everyday clothing (e.g., a 45yo man in a sharp blazer, a 70yo woman in a colorful silk scarf, an 80yo in a worn jacket).
• **Action**: **EVERYONE** in the frame is bursting into hearty laughter (open mouths, crinkled eyes), but **in wildly different directions and contexts**. The barista laughs while steaming milk. In the background: two 50-somethings laugh at a phone screen; an 80-year-old woman chuckles while looking out the window; someone laughs while pointing at a newspaper. It is messy, authentic, and bursting with life.

**ENVIRONMENTAL_DATA**:
• **Location**: Modern chain cafe. Wood textures, warm ambient light.
• **Atmosphere**: Milky steam billows from the espresso wand, swirling around the barista's laughing face. Sunlit dust motes.
• **Composition**: Close-to-medium shot on the barista. The wildly diverse, randomly interacting older crowd in the background/foreground is naturally blurred (shallow depth of field).

**CINEMATOGRAPHY**:
• **Camera**: Virtual Arri Alexa 65, Anamorphic 50mm. Shallow DOF.
• **Lighting**: Warm backlighting catches the steam. Soft fill light on wrinkled, joyful faces.

---

Video Prompt:

[UE5 / CGI Render]
[Duration: 5s]
[DOLLY IN]. A cinematic sequence of a vibrant aging society in a modern cafe.

**VISUALS**:
• **Action**: The 75+ Asian barista (aged Maggie Cheung/Youn Yuh-jung Face DNA) operates an espresso machine, deep wrinkles showing as she laughs heartily at her own thoughts. Thick steam hisses, wrapping around her silver hair. Surrounding her is a completely diverse, uncoordinated crowd spanning the entire older demographic (ages 40 to 80+). Some have salt-and-pepper hair, others pure white; some wear sharp blazers, others cozy cardigans. They are roaring with laughter in **entirely different directions**—some laugh over a shared joke at a table, others chuckle while reading, none are looking at the camera or at the barista. The camera slowly pushes in (Dolly In) through the glowing steam, capturing the chaotic, warm, and highly realistic physics of their independent moments of joy and the swirling vapor.
• **Camera**: Smooth DOLLY IN towards the barista's face through steam.

**AUDIO**:
• **SFX**: Hiss of steam wand, a chaotic chorus of overlapping, independent older laughter (varying pitches from 40s to 80s), clinking cups, faint cafe jazz.

**VISION CONCEPT**: A **Stylized 3D Realism** cinematic masterpiece depicting Tracksuit Chimp at a NYC Street Hot Dog Stand. The visual style follows the aesthetic of 'Love, Death & Robots' (Jibaro/Aquila Rift). **CRITICAL AESTHETIC: It must look like a real, hyper-detailed photograph at first glance, but upon closer inspection (the second glance), it reveals itself to be a flawlessly pristine, slightly uncanny 3D CGI render.** Rendered using a virtual Unreal Engine 5 MetaHuman pipeline (**Digital Art, NOT Photography**).

**IMPORTANT DIRECTIVE ON MEDIUM VS GENRE**: The instruction for "3D CGI", "MetaHuman", or "Unreal Engine" describes the **RENDER MEDIUM ONLY**. Do **NOT** automatically turn the narrative, clothing, or environment into Sci-Fi, Cyberpunk, or futuristic themes unless explicitly required by the Topic. Generate everyday life, high-fashion, or historical scenes natively within this pristine CGI medium.

**REFERENCE_PROTOCOL**:
• **Instruction**: Maintain 100% fidelity to the character's features while adapting them fully into the stylized, high-fidelity 3D CGI medium.

**STYLE GUIDELINES**:
• **Target**: Masterpiece 3D Art, Stylized Hyper-Realism, ZBrush sculpting, Octane Render, Ray Tracing, Uncanny Valley edge.
• **Avoid**: Real-world photography, real human skin, photorealism, live-action, amateur 3D, grainy footage, forced sci-fi/technological elements (unless Topic demands it).

**SUBJECT_DATA**:
• **Character Identity**: Hyper-realistic anthropomorphic chimpanzee with a huge, exaggerated toothy smile. Wearing iconic white slatted/shutter sunglasses. Brown fur covers head and limbs.
• **Face DNA (Celebrity Mix)**: Photorealistic chimpanzee physiognomy with human-like expressions.
• **Attire**: [FIXED OUTFIT] A fitted dark blue track jacket with double white sleeve stripes and an orange flower patch on the left chest, matching dark blue track pants with double white stripes, and white retro low-top leather sneakers. Realistic creasing, wear & tear.

• **Atmosphere**: Plumes of thick, glowing steam rise from the hot dog cart's water bath. Soft, diffused overcast daylight mixed with the warm amber glow from the cart's lights. Yellow taxi cabs blur in the background traffic.

• **Lighting**: Cinematic 3-point lighting. Strong rim light catching the steam and the edges of the character's fur, soft fill light on the face to highlight the exaggerated smile behind the slatted sunglasses.
